panels.description: Shows the total number of non-active assets of computer system class

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
INNER JOIN `SIT:Site`
ON (
    `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` = `SIT:Site`.`Site` AND `SIT:Site`.`Status`!=1
    )
WHERE (
   (`AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET') AND (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Company` In ($Company)) AND (`AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` != 'Deployed')
)

panels.title: Total Non-active Assets

panels.description: Shows the number of non-active assets  of computer system class by location.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
select t1.Site, t1.PrimaryCapability, SUM(t1.count) as AssetCount from
(SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` AS Site,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability,
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
INNER JOIN `SIT:Site`
ON (
    `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` = `SIT:Site`.`Site` AND `SIT:Site`.`Status`!=1
    )
WHERE (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
)
AND (PrimaryCapability is not null) AND (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Company` In ($Company)) AND (`AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` != 'Deployed')
GROUP BY 
   PrimaryCapability,
   Site
) AS t1
group by t1.PrimaryCapability, t1.Site

panels.title: Asset Distribution at Non-active Sites

panels.description: Shows the number of non-active assets  of computer system class by location.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` AS Site,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability,
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
INNER JOIN `SIT:Site`
ON (
    `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` = `SIT:Site`.`Site` AND `SIT:Site`.`Status`!=1
    )
WHERE (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
)
AND `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` is not null 
AND (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Company` In ($Company)) AND (`AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` != 'Deployed')
GROUP BY 
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability`,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Building`

panels.title: Asset Distribution at Non-Active Sites (Table)
Hosts with Outdated Operating Systems at Risk

panels.description: Shows the total number of outdated hosts that are at risk.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   (COUNT(`AST:BaseElement`.`Instance Id`)) AS count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:OperatingSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
WHERE (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
)
AND (
    `AST:BaseElement`.`Disposal Date` < currentDate() 
     AND `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSType` IS NOT NULL
     AND (`AST:OperatingSystem`.`Company` In ($Company))
)

panels.title: Total Hosts at Risk

panels.description: Shows the number of outdated operating systems by hosts in a chart.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT COUNT(t1.count) as hosts, t1.OSType from (
SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Disposal Date`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSType` AS OSType,
   (COUNT(`AST:BaseElement`.`Instance Id`)) AS count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:OperatingSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
WHERE (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
)
AND (
    `AST:BaseElement`.`Disposal Date` < currentDate()
    AND `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSType` IS NOT NULL)
    AND (`AST:OperatingSystem`.`Company` In ($Company))
GROUP BY 
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSType`,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Disposal Date`
) as t1
GROUP BY 
   t1.OSType

panels.title: Hosts with Outdated Operating Systems at Risk

panels.description: Shows the number of outdated operating systems by hosts in a tabular format.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Name`,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Disposal Date`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`BuildNumber`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`BuildType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`LicenseType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`LicensesAvailable`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`PatchNumber`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`ProductType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSLanguage`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSProductSuite`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSType` AS OSType,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`ServicePack`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`SuiteMask`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`SystemDirectory`,
   (COUNT(`AST:BaseElement`.`Instance Id`)) AS count,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Class Id`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:OperatingSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
WHERE (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
)
AND (
    `AST:BaseElement`.`Disposal Date` < currentDate()
    AND `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSType` IS NOT NULL
)
AND (`AST:OperatingSystem`.`Company` In ($Company))
GROUP BY 
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`ServicePack`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`LicensesAvailable`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`ProductType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`BuildType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSProductSuite`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`LicenseType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`BuildNumber`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`PatchNumber`,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Disposal Date`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`SuiteMask`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Name`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSLanguage`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`SystemDirectory`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Class Id`

panels.title: Hosts with Outdated Operating Systems at Risk (Table)

panels.description: Shows the total number of refreshed assets of computer system class

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS Count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
WHERE 
(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET')
AND (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Company` In ($Company))

panels.title: Total Assets

panels.description: Shows the distribution of refreshed assests  of computer system class in a chart.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   (CASE
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) AS __metric__ ,
   currentDate() AS __time__,
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS Count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
WHERE (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET') AND (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Company` In ($Company))
GROUP BY
    __metric__

panels.title: Refreshed Asset Distribution

panels.description: Shows the distribution of refreshed assests  of computer system class in a tabular format.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   (CASE WHEN `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` is null then 'Not Managed' ELSE `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` END) AS Manager,
   (CASE
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) AS Age,
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS Count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
WHERE (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET' AND (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Company` In ($Company))
)
GROUP BY 
    Age,
    Manager
